violations.text: The sink now used for handwashing is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands is required at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken to the 3 bay sink to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Pasta and sausage observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen. Single service items observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2023
The light bulb beneath the hood was nonfunctional at time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

The ceiling in the women's toilet room is in poor repair, with water stained and cracked ceiling tiles pulled out of place, exposing spun insulation. One hand washing sink in the women's toilet room is in poor repair, nonfunctional and falling into the cabinet below. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023
